test_cases.name: Submit POST `/api/v1/customers` with natural person payload: `{ "name": "Zhang San", "idCardNo": "11010119900307271X", "mobile": "+8613800138000", "consent": {"optIn": true, "purpose": ["KYC", "marketing"], "validUntil": "2027-06-15"} }`
Verify system generates unique `customerID` and `consentID`
test_cases.environment: - Staging environment with live SM4 HSM (e.g., Huawei Cloud KMS or Zhongchuang SM4 module);
